---
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: sentence
---

**Researchers (secondary analysis and method development)**

-   **Who**: Academic or applied researchers.

-   **Want**: Use novel layers directly (not just the final index) to run new analyses, validate predictors, or build new models.

-   **Examples mentioned**: Defensible space layer (predictive of structure loss), and road connectivity metrics (roads in and out of a community).

-   **Key traits**: Wants flexible access to raw layers and the ability to manipulate them for new questions.


```{r}

# 1) Does it find the STAC catalog.json where we expect?
wri_resolve_stac_path()

# 2) Can it read the catalog?
root <- wri_read_stac_root()
root$type
root$id

# 3) Can it traverse collections + items?
tree <- wri_read_stac_tree()
length(tree$collections)
length(tree$items)

# 4) Peek one item + assets
names(tree$items)[1]
head(tree$items[[1]]$assets)
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# demo_wri_catalog_three_files.R
# Tests:
#   - wri_catalog_utils.R  (path resolve, read root, read tree, assets)
#   - wri_catalog.R        (wri_catalog constructor)
#   - wri_print.R          (print.wri_catalog output + classification)
# ============================================================

cat("\n============================\n")
cat("DEMO: WRI CATALOG (3 files)\n")
cat("============================\n\n")

# ---- 0) Source the three files (use your actual paths) ----
source("~/MEDS/Capstone/fedex/R/wri_catalog_utils.R")
source("~/MEDS/Capstone/fedex/R/wri_catalog.R")
source("~/MEDS/Capstone/fedex/R/wri_print.R")

cat("✓ sourced utils, catalog, print\n\n")

# ---- 1) Basic dependency check ----
if (!requireNamespace("rstac", quietly = TRUE)) {
  stop("Missing 'rstac'. Install with install.packages('rstac')", call. = FALSE)
}
cat("✓ rstac available\n\n")

# ---- 2) Utils: resolve + read root ----
cat("1) Resolve STAC path\n")
stac_path <- wri_resolve_stac_path()
cat("   STAC:", stac_path, "\n\n")

cat("2) Read STAC root\n")
root <- wri_read_stac_root()
cat("   root$type:", root$type, "\n")
cat("   root$id:  ", root$id, "\n\n")

# ---- 3) Utils: read full tree ----
cat("3) Read STAC tree (catalog -> collections -> items)\n")
tree <- wri_read_stac_tree()
n_col <- length(tree$collections)
n_it  <- length(tree$items)
cat("   collections:", n_col, "\n")
cat("   items:      ", n_it, "\n\n")

stopifnot(n_col >= 1)
stopifnot(n_it  >= 1)

# Peek first item + assets
first_id <- names(tree$items)[[1]]
first_it <- tree$items[[first_id]]

cat("4) Peek first item\n")
cat("   id:        ", first_id, "\n", sep = "")
cat("   collection:", first_it$collection, "\n", sep = "")
cat("   item_path: ", first_it$item_path, "\n", sep = "")

if (!is.data.frame(first_it$assets)) {
  stop("Expected first_it$assets to be a data.frame", call. = FALSE)
}
cat("   assets rows:", nrow(first_it$assets), "\n")
cat("   assets cols:", ncol(first_it$assets), "\n\n")
cat("   assets head:\n")
print(utils::head(first_it$assets, 5))
cat("\n")

# ---- 4) Catalog constructor: wri_catalog() ----
cat("5) Build wri_catalog() object (tests wri_catalog.R)\n")
wcat <- wri_catalog(fresh = TRUE)

cat("   class: ", paste(class(wcat), collapse = ", "), "\n", sep = "")
cat("   built_at: ", format(wcat$built_at), "\n", sep = "")
cat("   path: ", wcat$path, "\n\n", sep = "")

stopifnot(inherits(wcat, "wri_catalog"))
stopifnot(is.list(wcat$data))
stopifnot(length(wcat$data$items) == n_it)

# ---- 5) Print method: print.wri_catalog() ----
cat("6) Print catalog (tests wri_print.R)\n\n")
print(wcat)
cat("\n")

# ---- 6) Quick domain-prefix sanity check (matches print classifier logic) ----
cat("7) Sanity check: how many items match known domain_* prefix?\n")

domains_print <- c(
  "air_quality", "communities", "infrastructure", "livelihoods",
  "natural_habitats", "sense_of_place", "species", "water"
)

item_ids <- names(wcat$data$items)
matches <- vapply(
  item_ids,
  function(id) any(startsWith(tolower(id), paste0(domains_print, "_"))),
  logical(1)
)

cat("   matching:", sum(matches), "/", length(matches), "\n", sep = "")

if (any(!matches)) {
  ex <- head(item_ids[!matches], 15)
  cat("   examples not matching domain_* (up to 15):\n   - ",
      paste(ex, collapse = "\n   - "),
      "\n", sep = "")
  cat("\n   (This is expected if you have ids like 'WRI_score' or domains not listed in print().)\n")
}

cat("\n============================\n")
cat("DEMO COMPLETE ✅\n")
cat("============================\n")
```
